memberdef.argsstring: (ServerCredentials const &InCredentialsRef, ServerSettings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< FServerApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > InServerApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: ServerEcommerce

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, bool bActiveOnly, FString const &EntitlementName, TArray< FString > const &ItemIds, int32 Offset, int32 Limit, THandler< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementPagingSlicedResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, EAccelByteEntitlementClass EntitlementClass=EAccelByteEntitlementClass::NONE, EAccelByteAppType AppType=EAccelByteAppType::NONE, TArray< FString > const &Features={})
memberdef.name: QueryUserEntitlements

briefdescription.para: Get list of user's Entitlement(s).

parameterdescription.para: The user id who have the entitlements
Set as true if you want to search the active only, and vice-versa.
The name of the entitlement (optional).
Item's id (optional).
Offset of the list that has been sliced based on Limit parameter (optional, default = 0).
The limit of item on page (optional).
This will be called when the operation success. The result is const FAccelByteModelsEntitlementPagingSlicedResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Class of the entitlement (optional).
This is the type of application that entitled (optional).
(optional).

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &EntitlementId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserEntitlementById

briefdescription.para: Get Entitlement's Info by the EntitlementId.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the entitlement.
This will be called when the operation success. The result is const FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &EntitlementId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserEntitlementById

briefdescription.para: Get Entitlement info by the UserId and EntitlementId.

parameterdescription.para: The user id who have the entitlements
The id of the entitlement
This will be called when the operation success. The result is const FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, TArray< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementGrant > const &EntitlementGrant, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsStackableEntitlementInfo > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GrantUserEntitlements

briefdescription.para: Granting Entitlement(s) to a user.

parameterdescription.para: The user who will get the entilement(s).
Consist of the entitlement(s) that will be granted.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an array of FAccelByteModelsStackableEntitlementInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &CurrencyCode, FAccelByteModelsCreditUserWalletRequest const &CreditUserWalletRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsWalletInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: CreditUserWallet

briefdescription.para: Credit a user wallet by currency code, if the wallet does not exist, it will create a new wallet.

parameterdescription.para: The user who will receive credit.
The currency code.
The request to credit a user wallet.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsWalletInfo&.
This will be called when the operation fails.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &CurrencyCode, FAccelByteModelsCreditUserWalletRequest const &CreditUserWalletRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsWalletCreditResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: CreditUserWalletV2

briefdescription.para: Credit a user wallet by currency code, if the wallet does not exist, it will create a new wallet.

parameterdescription.para: The user who will receive credit.
The currency code.
The request to credit a user wallet.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsWalletCreditResponse&.
This will be called when the operation fails.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, TArray< FString > const &EntitlementIds, THandler< FAccelByteModelsBulkRevokeEntitlements > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: RevokeUserEntitlements

briefdescription.para: Revoke Entitlement from a User (Many).

parameterdescription.para: The user id who have the entitlements
The ids of the entitlements
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsBulkRevokeEntitlements&.
This will be called when the operation fails.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &EntitlementId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: RevokeUserEntitlement

briefdescription.para: Revoke Entitlement from a User (Single).

parameterdescription.para: The user id who have the entitlement
The id of the entitlements
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo&.
This will be called when the operation fails.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &EntitlementId, int32 UseCount, THandler< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, TArray< FString > Options={}, FString const &RequestId={})
memberdef.name: ConsumeUserEntitlement

briefdescription.para: Consume Entitlement from a User.

parameterdescription.para: The user id who have the entitlement
The id of the entitlements
How many that will be consumed
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo&.
This will be called when the operation fails.
Options of consumed entitlements.
Request id(Optional), A unique tracking ID provided by the developer, can just left it empty if they don't want to track When a request id is submitted, it will return original successful response

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &EntitlementId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: DisableUserEntitlement

briefdescription.para: Disable Entitlement from a User. Like a revoke, but it can be enabled by calling func EnableUserEntitlement.

parameterdescription.para: The user id who have the entitlement
The id of the entitlements
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo&.
This will be called when the operation fails.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &EntitlementId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: EnableUserEntitlement

briefdescription.para: Enable Entitlement that has been disabled.

parameterdescription.para: The user id who have the entitlement
The id of the entitlements
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsBulkRevokeEntitlements&.
This will be called when the operation fails.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: PaymentWithUserWallet

briefdescription.para: Pay with user wallet by currency code and client platform, can debit to all available wallet depending on configuration set in Admin Portal's platform wallet config.

parameterdescription.para: The user who will receive credit.
The Currency Code.
The request to debit a user wallet.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsWalletInfo&.
This will be called when the operation fails.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: DebitByWalletPlatform

briefdescription.para: Debit a specific currency from a user based on platform.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the user to debit from
Code of the currency that we wish to debit using
Structure describing the requested amount, reason, and platform for debiting the wallet
Delegate called when debit of user's wallet succeeds
Delegate called when debit of user's wallet fails

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &CurrencyCode, int32 Offset, int32 Limit, THandler< FAccelByteModelsListUserCurrencyTransactionsResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ListUserCurrencyTransactions

briefdescription.para: List transactions for a given user's currency wallet, sorted by creation time in descending order.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the user to query currency transactions for
Code of the currency to query transactions for
Paging offset for this request, set to zero for first page
Paging limit for this request, if set to zero, the default of 20 items will be used
Delegate called when query for currency transactions succeeds
Delegate called when query for currency transactions fails

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation

memberdef.name: GetPlatformWalletConfig

briefdescription.para: Get current configuration for a specific platform's wallet.

parameterdescription.para: Enum represeting the platform to get wallet configuration for
Delegate called when query for platform wallet config succeeds
Delegate called when query for platform wallet config fails

parameterdescription.para: Enum represeting the platform to update wallet configuration for
Structure representing the updated values for a platform's wallet config
Delegate called when updating platform wallet config succeeds
Delegate called when updating platform wallet config fails

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelByteWalletPlatform const &Platform, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPlatformWalletConfig > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ResetPlatformWalletConfig

briefdescription.para: Reset the configuration for a specific platform's wallet back to its default.

parameterdescription.para: Enum represeting the platform to update wallet configuration for
Delegate called when resetting platform wallet config succeeds
Delegate called when resetting platform wallet config fails

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation

briefdescription.para: Check the given user's balance to see if it meets the given criteria.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the user to check balance for
Code of the currency to check balance against
Structure representing the criteria for the balance check
Delegate called when balance check succeeds
Delegate called when balance check fails

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation

memberdef.argsstring: ()=delete
memberdef.name: ServerEcommerce

memberdef.argsstring: (ServerEcommerce const &)=delete
memberdef.name: ServerEcommerce

memberdef.argsstring: (ServerEcommerce &&)=delete
memberdef.name: ServerEcommerce

briefdescription.para: Ecommerce API to manage user's Ecommerce related things like Entitlement and Wallet.
